description: DISTINCT on large result set instead of GROUP BY — implicit cross join syntax
original_sql: SELECT DISTINCT C_NAME, C_NATIONKEY, O_ORDERSTATUS FROM CUSTOMER, ORDERS WHERE CUSTOMER.C_CUSTKEY = ORDERS.O_CUSTKEY

description: Function on filter column prevents partition pruning — YEAR/MONTH wrapping date column
original_sql: SELECT L_ORDERKEY, L_QUANTITY, L_EXTENDEDPRICE FROM LINEITEM WHERE YEAR(L_SHIPDATE) = 1995 AND MONTH(L_SHIPDATE) = 3

description: NOT IN with subquery — poor performance vs NOT EXISTS or anti-join
original_sql: SELECT P_PARTKEY, P_NAME, P_RETAILPRICE FROM PART WHERE P_PARTKEY NOT IN ( SELECT L_PARTKEY FROM LINEITEM WHERE L_RETURNFLAG = 'R' )

description: Redundant nested subqueries with LIKE leading wildcard — unnecessary nesting prevents pushdown
original_sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C_CUSTKEY, C_NAME, C_ADDRESS, C_PHONE, C_ACCTBAL, C_MKTSEGMENT FROM CUSTOMER ) inner_q WHERE C_NAME LIKE '%000001%' ) outer_q WHERE C_ACCTBAL > 0 ORDER BY C_ACCTBAL
